## 🧑‍💻 About Me

```yaml
Name     : Munagala Sai Surendra
Role     : Associate IT Support Engineer
Location : Hyderabad, India 🇮🇳
Experience: ~1 Year
OS       : Linux (Kali + Ubuntu) — terminals are home
Status   : 🔥 Actively learning DevOps tools
Focus    : Servers · Scripting · Automation · Security
```

- 🖥️ **Linux-first** — I live in the terminal; GUIs are optional
- 🔧 **Troubleshooter** — if it's broken, I'll dig until it's fixed
- 🚀 **DevOps path** — Docker, CI/CD, monitoring stacks in progress
- 🧠 **Philosophy** — automate the boring stuff, document everything else
- ⚡ **Side quests** — home labs, self-hosted tools, cybersecurity experiments
